nasb.text: In the third year of the reign of Jehoiakim king of Judah, Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came to Jerusalem and besieged it.

esv.text: In the third year of the reign of Jehoiakim king of Judah, Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came to Jerusalem and besieged it.

cnv.text: 猶大王約雅敬在位第三年，巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒來到耶路撒冷，把城圍困。

ccb.text: 犹大王约雅敬执政第三年，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒前来围攻耶路撒冷。
